response:
produce the definite integral of $ P(x) = 4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7 $ from $ x = 0 $ to $ x = 10 $, representing the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna.  
produce the calculation involves integrating each term separately and summing the results.  
produce the integral of $ 4x^3 $ is $ x^4 $, the integral of $ 3x^2 $ is $ x^3 $, the integral of $ 2x $ is $ x^2 $, and the integral of 7 is $ 7x $.  
* * *  
produce the definite integral from 0 to 10 is $ \left[ x^4 + x^3 + x^2 + 7x \right]_0^{10} $.  
produce the value at 10 is $ 10^4 + 10^3 + 10^2 + 7 \times 10 = 10000 + 1000 + 100 + 70 = 11170 $.  
produce the value at 0 is 0.  
* * *  
produce the Fourier series representation of $ Q(t) = 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $ up to the second harmonic.  
produce the series is $ 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $.  
produce the Fourier series is already in its simplest form with the given harmonics.
